Chloroquine 係支那冇用未必真係對virus冇用，lab test 同試係body 到係有好大分別，可能係人體有其他mechanisms inhibit 隻藥, Chloroquine 係靠autophagy去作用，啫係lysosomal degradation，而autophagy 係真係受好多pathways 影響。所以combined treatment 有用唔一定係假。

replies.msg: 丙肝病毒？

oxford 都話應該有效， 而且安全

https://academic.oup.com/jac/advance-article/doi/10.1093/jac/dkaa114/5810487

上面有人話Azithromycin 係antibiotics 唔可能醫倒由病毒引起嘅武漢肺炎，我一開始都覺得好難理解。

但原來早於2010年已經有研究關於Azithromycin嘅antiviral property (1). Mechanism 大概係增強左免疫系統嘅反應同減少virus 嘅 replication 由 release.
亦都有文章證實佢喺cystic fibrosis可以可以減少viral replication (in vitro) (2).

不過樓主講嘅研究 (3) 個sample size 太細，得26個人。加上唔係randomised control trial. 個result 未必好有意思。可以cautiously optimistic 不過要有再多啲evidence先。

References:
1. https://erj.ersjournals.com/content/36/3/646
2. https://erj.ersjournals.com/content/45/2/428
3. https://www.mediterranee-infection.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Hydroxychloroquine_final_DOI_IJAA.pdf

因為佢個樣似足武漢病毒 既主要食物 ，而又呃到隻病毒肯食隻老鼠藥，但隻病毒未瓜柴囉。

Remdesivir咪證實副作用好大，仲有remdesivir當初過唔到伊波拉，就係因為毒性同副作用，原理我都知，但病毒係係冇人真係打敗過，只有天花，係事實，天花仲要係dna病毒

replies.msg:
暫時啲research studies 都係講緊 Remdesivir 係針對 viral 既 RNA polymerase 同埋避得過proofreading RNA backbone 既 exoribonuclease

不同物種既蛋白酶係會有不同specificity

Human 既RNA polymerase 及 exoribonuclease 兩種酶 同 virus字面上功能係可以係差唔多 但實際上specificity 係好大分別

而人工製造核苷Remdesivir 就係針對 viral polymerase 及exoribonuclease

如果之後啲研究發現human polymerase 及exoribonuclease 對 Remdesivir 無選擇性就相反變成毒藥

同埋片入面RNA 點解 會係T 而唔係U?....

replies.msg:
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/15590715
(1) Research into macrolide immunomodulation for chronic pulmonary disorders demonstrates consistent positive effects, although of types other than seen with diffuse panbronchiolitis. These effects, together with their inhibitory activity on biofilms, have the potential to make them a useful option. (2) The benefits for CAP are consistent, and higher when a macrolide is given with another atypical agent than if the other atypical agent is given alone, suggesting a non-antibacterial benefit. (3) Recent research of the immunomodulatory properties of azithromycin imply that azithromycin may have a previously unknown short-term biphasic effect on inflammation modulation: enhancement of host defence mechanisms shortly after initial administration followed by curtailment of local infection/inflammation in the following period. (4) Additional in vivo research is needed prior to developing any firm conclusions.

其實 HCQ 主要用來醫類風濕關節炎 rheumatoid arthritis (自身免疫疾病)

Azithromycin 這類 macrolide 很多時有抑制免疫作用, 跟樓上說的一樣

Remdesivir 抑制 RNA-dependent RNA polymerase, 而人體正常來說沒有這樣的酵素
